_comment: Single source of truth for DMF module dependencies and wave grouping. d365-deployment, module-fanout, and d365-config-builder MUST derive their wave tables from this file. Update HERE; never duplicate elsewhere.

waves.rationale: Foundational system setup — must complete before anything.
GL shared + workflow both depend only on 010.
Core GL — single, blocking, downstream of 020.
Finance modules all depend on 025; no cross-dependencies among themselves.
Inventory — single, blocking, parent of SCM tree.
PIM, Procurement, Sales, Quality — all depend on 300; cross-deps to 120/140 already satisfied in wave 4.
Warehouse / Transport / Production / Process / Config / Costing / Planning — all depend on 300+; mutually independent within wave.
Retail — depends on 300, 100, 330; serialized to avoid retail-channel race conditions.
